transcript: Speaker A: What happened? Speaker B: I got a burning tongue. Speaker A: It's burnt tongue, not burning tongue. Burning means abhi jal raha hai [Burning means it is burning right now], but burnt means already jal chuka hai [but burnt means it has already burned]. Bolo [Say], I burnt my tongue. Speaker B: Oh! I burnt my tongue. Mujhe acchi english bolni nahi aati. Hamesha atak jata hun ya galti kar deta hun [I don't know how to speak good English. I always get stuck or make mistakes]. Speaker A: Relax, Tum tension mat lo, mai ek AI Teacher hun, tum unlimited mujhese har din english bolna practice kar sakte ho [Relax, don't worry, I am an AI Teacher, you can practice speaking English with me unlimited every day]. Aur koi bhi galti karoge mai turant use correct karke de dungi [And if you make any mistake, I will correct it immediately]. Speaker B: English bolna mai kitne time mai seekh jaunga? [How long will it take for me to learn to speak English?] Speaker A: Hum roz aise hi practice karte rahenge. Bas har din 10 se 15 min mere sath practice karo aur 15 dino mai tumhari english improve ho jayegi [We will keep practicing like this every day. Just practice with me for 10 to 15 minutes daily and your English will improve in 15 days]. Speaker B: Mehnga bhi hoga na? [It must be expensive, right?] Speaker A: SpeakX app mai sirf ₹2/day me aap 7 days ka trial le sakte hain [On the SpeakX app, you can get a 7-day trial for just ₹2/day]. Speaker B: Mai kaise join karu? [How do I join?] Speaker A: Install button pe click karo, aur aaj se hi SpeakX app par english bolna shuru karo [Click on the install button, and start speaking English on the SpeakX app from today].
on_screen_text: What happened? I got a burning tongue. It's burnt tongue, not burning tongue. Burning means abhi jal raha hai [Burning means it is burning right now] but burnt means already jal chuka hai [but burnt means it has already burned]. Bolo [Say] I burnt my tongue. Oh! I burnt my tongue. Mujhe acchi english bolni nahi aati [I don't know how to speak good English] Hamesha atak jata hun ya galti kar deta hun [I always get stuck or make mistakes]. Relex, Tum tension mat lo [Relax, don't worry], mai ek AI Teacher hun [I am an AI Teacher], Tum unlimited mujhese har din english bolna practice kar sakte ho [You can practice speaking English with me unlimited every day]. Aur koi bhi galti karoge mai turant use correct karke de dungi [And if you make any mistake, I will correct it immediately]. English bolna mai kitne time mai seekh jaunga? [How long will it take for me to learn to speak English?] Hum roz aise hi practice karte rahenge [We will keep practicing like this every day]. Bas har din 10 se 15 min mere sath practice karo [Just practice with me for 10 to 15 minutes daily] aur 15 dino mai tumhari english improve ho jayegi [and your English will improve in 15 days]. Mehnga bhi hoga na? [It must be expensive, right?] SpeakX app mai sirf ₹2/day me aap 7 days ka trial le sakte hain [On the SpeakX app, you can get a 7-day trial for just ₹2/day]. Mai kaise join karu? [How do I join?] Install button pe click karo [Click on the install button], aur aaj se hi SpeakX app par english bolna shuru karo [and start speaking English on the SpeakX app from today].
summary: A split-screen ad where an AI avatar corrects a man's English grammar after he burns his tongue. The avatar introduces herself as an AI English teacher on the SpeakX app, offering daily practice with instant corrections. She promises English improvement in 15 days for just ₹2/day with a 7-day trial, prompting users to install the app.
